title: Complete a cash sale from the POS terminal
description: A cashier can search for products, build a cart, complete a cash payment, and see a receipt confirmation.

steps.description: Add the product to the cart
Verify a receipt confirmation is visible
Verify the completed sale is recorded

title: Log in and reach the tenant dashboard
description: A tenant or admin user can sign in with valid credentials and land on the tenant dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the tenant dashboard is displayed

title: Edit cart quantity and apply a discount before payment
description: A cashier can adjust quantities and apply a discount before completing a sale so the final cart reflects the changes.

steps.description: Add the product to the cart
Verify the receipt confirmation is visible
Verify the sale total reflects the cart changes

title: Build and confirm an M-Pesa sale on the POS terminal
description: A cashier can start an M-Pesa STK Push payment from the POS and see a successful receipt after confirmation on the phone.

steps.description: Add the product to the cart
Select M-Pesa as the payment method
Send the STK Push payment request
Confirm the payment on the phone
Verify a receipt confirmation is visible
Verify the sale is marked as paid

title: Assign a customer to a sale before checkout
description: A cashier can search for a customer, assign them to the current sale, and complete checkout with the customer linked to the receipt.

steps.description: Add the product to the cart
Assign the customer to the sale
Verify a receipt confirmation is visible
Verify the assigned customer is included in the sale

title: Add a new product to inventory
description: A manager can create a product in inventory and see it appear in the product list.

steps.description: Create a new product with valid details
Verify the new product appears in the inventory list

title: View dashboard KPIs and low-stock alerts
description: A manager can open the dashboard and see business performance indicators together with any low-stock alerts.

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the invoice is marked as submitted

title: Register a new tenant account
description: A new business can submit registration details and see confirmation that email verification has been sent.

steps.description: Fill in the business name field with Acme Retail
Fill in the subdomain field with acme-retail
Fill in the owner email field with owner@example.com
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Verify a registration confirmation is visible
Verify an email verification message is visible
